summary: The world's largest country by land mass, a nuclear superpower, and permanent UN Security Council member whose invasion of Ukraine in 2022 fractured the post-Cold War order and triggered the largest European land war since 1945.

history.detail: Peter the Great formalises the empire after victories over Sweden.
Catastrophic French defeat; Russia confirmed as major European power.
Lenin seizes power; Romanov dynasty ends; USSR founded 1922.
Secret non-aggression pact with Nazi Germany; divides Eastern Europe.
27 million Soviet citizens die; Soviets ultimately defeat Germany.
USSR occupies Eastern Europe; nuclear weapons developed by 1949.
First satellite shocks the West; space race begins.
Closest point to nuclear war; Khrushchev backs down.
USSR dissolves into 15 republics; Russia inherits nuclear arsenal.
First as PM, then President; Second Chechen War launched.
Russia invades Georgia; annexes South Ossetia.
Russia seizes Crimea from Ukraine; Donbas war begins.
Largest European land war since 1945; massive Western sanctions.

finance.currency_role: Ruble — heavily sanctioned; partially backed by gold and commodities
finance.central_bank: Bank of Russia (1860) — $600B reserves mostly frozen by West since 2022

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Heavily restricted by sanctions; significant brain drain post-2022

resources.oil_gas: World's second-largest oil exporter; largest natural gas reserves
resources.rare_earths: Significant deposits; major palladium producer (40% of world supply)
resources.water: Baikal holds 20% of world's unfrozen freshwater
resources.agriculture: World's largest wheat exporter; grain as geopolitical leverage

follow_the_money.detail: Oil and gas historically ~40% of state revenue; redirected to China/India post-2022 sanctions
Estimated $1T+ in offshore assets; UK/Cyprus hubs targeted by sanctions
Building USD-alternative settlement system with China, India, Brazil

theories_disputed.detail: JIT investigation confirmed Russian military BUK missile shot down MH17 over Ukraine 2014.
UK and EU confirmed Russian GRU/FSB used Novichok nerve agent.
Mueller Report confirmed Russian IRA social media ops; direct vote manipulation unproven.

connections.detail: No-limits partnership; China buys sanctioned Russian oil/gas
Cold War legacy; sanctions regime post-2022
Iran supplies Shaheed drones for Ukraine war
